text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-off, small caps resilient, oil plunged, Iran tensions flared. US-Iran Hormuz flare-up erased Friday's rally, with SPY/QQQ dipping amid oil's -7.79% USO plunge while small caps IWM +0.57% held firm. Flows favored cyclicals like XLY +2.36%, signaling rotation from megacaps despite geopolitics.

INDICES — VIX N/A. IWM +0.57%, DIA +0.02%, SPY -0.20%, QQQ -0.32%. Small > large by 0.77pp. USO oil -7.79% most notable.

VOLUME — Elevated: XLY 1.0x, MSOS 3.1x, XLF 0.9x gaining attention. Declining: SPY 0.5x, QQQ 0.6x, XLV 0.5x ignored. SPY/QQQ vol down + price down signals distribution; XLY vol up + price up = accumulation.

SECTORS — XLY Discretionary +2.36%, XLI Industrials +1.87%, XLK Technology +1.53%, XLRE Real Estate +1.53%, XLP Staples +1.26%, XLF Financials +0.77%, XLB Materials +0.25%, XLE Energy +0.09%, XLC Comms -0.29%, XLU Utilities -0.89%, XLV Healthcare -0.93%. Top industries MSOS +8.75%, ARKG +3.18%; bottom FCG -3.72%, USO -7.79%.

THE 7s — Software +2.01% (strongest SNOW, weakest CRM), Freight +1.50% (strongest CHRW, weakest EXPD), Industrial +1.35% (strongest HII, weakest CW), Buildout +1.11% (strongest PWR, weakest ACM), New Metals +0.95% (strongest ALB, weakest SQM). Energy -2.21% (strongest SLB, weakest FANG), Old Metals -1.15% (strongest FCX, weakest NEM), Power -0.95% (strongest NEE, weakest CEg), Mag 7 -0.95% (strongest GOOG, weakest NFLX), New Staples -0.82% (strongest CPB, weakest MNST).

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Stance: Hawk 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), Neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), Dove 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly).

POSITIONING — No options intel available.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil USO -7.79% despite Iran tensions dragging energy XLE +0.09% flat vs airlines/cruises slipping on fuel costs. Gold GLD -0.86% with dollar UUP -0.15% offers no haven bid.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 56.9 neutral. Top movers MSOS +8.75% industries, ARKG +3.18% industries, XTN +2.80% industries. 20d momentum: New Metals +26.71% best sector/basket, Energy -6.54% worst sector/basket. Vol spikes MSOS 3.1x +8.75% accumulation, DBC 2.5x -2.82% distribution; MSOS on cannabis vol.

WATCH — MSOS +8.75%, vol 3.1x spike. ALB in New Metals +0.95%, trend divergence post-surge/decline. USO -7.79%, oil-Hormuz cross-signal break.
